channel.title: Sachin Lakshitha
channel.description: Systems programmer · backend engineer. Going deeper than the abstraction until something real appears.

item.title: BACKTESTING ENGINE
item.description: A high-performance C++ orderbook reconstructor designed for nanosecond-level latency. It parses raw NASDAQ ITCH 5.0 binary feeds into a cache-aware limit order book using custom lock-free SPSC queues and object pools.

item.title: ROYAL LIQUOR
item.description: Full e-commerce platform built without frameworks. Custom router, custom dependency injection container, custom SPA renderer. 23 models, 26 services, layered middleware architecture.

item.title: RAG PIPELINE
item.description: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation pipeline. Uses Groq as inference provider for sub-200ms response times. Chunking strategy optimized for technical documentation.

item.title: Deadlines? — Banned C++ Features in Real-Time Systems
item.description: Why every banned feature in HFT has cost = f(runtime input). WCET analysis, store buffer drains, and making systems provably bounded.

item.title: How Mathematics is Predicting Wildfire Paths
item.description: ICAPS 2025 research review — Level Set Method combined with Bayesian correction for self-correcting wildfire boundary simulation.

item.title: Building an OS from Scratch
item.description: LuckyOS — a 16-bit operating system written in x86 Assembly. BIOS interrupts, CPUID, custom bootloader, and kernel from zero.

item.title: MySQL Stored Procedures
item.description: Precompiled SQL, reduced network traffic, and encapsulated database logic. When to use them and when to avoid.

item.title: The CIA Triad: The Cornerstone of Cyber Security
item.description: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability — the framework for evaluating security measures across digital and physical environments.
